title: BITS Pilani Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Posts
description: The latest Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Computer Science Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the BITS Pilani Notification 2026 . Here we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, application fee, ...
